description: File transfer capabilities the Device supports
doc: Features and capabilities the Device implementation or plafrom supports and is able to receive from Astarte.

mappings.doc: List of encoding formats supported by the device, possible values are: [gz, lz4, tar, tar.gz, tar.lz4].

mappings.description: Support unix file mode, user id and group id.
mappings.doc: Flag to support setting the file mode, user and group ownership of a transferred file in a unix system.

mappings.description: Supported destination and sources for the transfers.
mappings.doc: List of sources and destinations that the device can handle, possible values are: [storage, streaming, filesystem]
